PushEvent:yasyf/captain-hook.summary: moved hook-event registration into a shipped hooks.json (v9.0.0)

PushEvent:yasyf/cc-context.summary: added a render chain that escalates thin JS app-shell pages (0.12.0)

PushEvent:yasyf/cc-guides.summary: removed the v1 .src render path, leaving lock-only checking (0.1.17)

PushEvent:yasyf/cc-notes.summary: collapsed fusefs and cli onto generic builders; dropped the differential oracle

PushEvent:yasyf/cc-present.summary: added plugin-supplied block packs with dynamic web and iOS rendering

PushEvent:yasyf/cc-skills.summary: retired the guides push model for a pull-model cc-guides scaffold (v0.41.0)

PushEvent:yasyf/cc-transcript.summary: memoized transcript discovery and opted judges out of per-row probes (10.8.0)

PushEvent:yasyf/fusekit.summary: added a self-owning holder with spec-journal replay and idle-gated self-retire

PushEvent:yasyf/getaway.summary: built an award-flight planning skill on seats.aero across 26 mileage programs

PushEvent:yasyf/homebrew-tap.summary: bumped casks for cc-notes v0.24.0, ccx v0.11.0, and fusekit-holder v0.38.4

captain-hook@v9.0.0.summary: registered every hook event via a shipped hooks.json; deduped dispatch

cc-guides@v0.1.17.summary: renamed --banner-version to --lock-version and removed the v1 .src render path

cc-interact@v0.1.0.summary: the domain-agnostic agent, daemon, and web framework extracted from cc-review

cc-pool@v0.50.2.summary: returned needs-login instead of panicking when sampling a tokenless credential

spawnllm@v0.5.5.summary: passed codex --skip-git-repo-check so verdicts run in untrusted cwds
